follow.confirmUnfollowMessage: You will no longer receive notifications from this channel and it will disappear from your following list

chat.heading: Chat
chat.unavailableMessage: Chat is unavailable while the channel is offline. Please check back later!

confirmModal.heading: Delete Stream Thumbnail
confirmModal.message: Are you sure you want to delete the stream thumbnail? This action cannot be undone.

thumbnail.info: Supported formats: JPG, JPEG, PNG, or GIF. Max size: 10 MB.

info.titleDescription: Enter a title for your stream. It should be short and catchy.
info.categoryDescription: Select the category that matches your content. This helps viewers find your stream more easily.

success.heading: Payment completed!
success.congratulations: You now have access to the channel's premium content!
success.support: If you have any questions, please contact support.

register.heading: Register for MiroStream
register.backButtonLabel: Already have an account? Log in
register.usernameDescription: This is the name other users will know you by.
register.emailDescription: We may use your email to send account-related notifications.
register.passwordDescription: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
register.successAlertDescription: A confirmation email has been sent to your address.

login.heading: Login to MiroStream
login.backButtonLabel: Don't have an account? Sign up!
login.loginDescription: Your username or email that you used during registration.
login.passwordDescription: The password you used during registration.
login.pinDescription: Enter the code from your authentication app.

resetPassword.heading: Reset password
resetPassword.emailDescription: The email address you entered during registration
resetPassword.successAlertDescription: We have sent a password reset link to your email.

newPassword.heading: New Password
newPassword.passwordDescription: The password you used during registration
newPassword.passwordRepeatDescription: Repeat your new password to confirm
newPassword.errorMessage: Error while setting a new password

deactivate.heading: Account Deactivation
deactivate.emailDescription: The email address you used during registration
deactivate.passwordDescription: The password you entered during registration
deactivate.pinDescription: A code has been sent to your email. If you have Telegram notifications enabled, we sent the code there as well

header.heading: Settings
header.description: Here you can manage your settings

header.heading: Profile
header.description: Set up your profile, update your avatar, and change your personal information.

avatar.heading: Profile Image

confirmModal.heading: Delete avatar
confirmModal.message: Are you sure you want to delete your profile image? This action cannot be undone.

avatar.info: Supported formats: JPG, JPEG, PNG, WEBP or GIF. Max size: 10 MB.

info.heading: Profile Settings
info.usernameDescription: Other users will know you by this name.
info.displayNameDescription: Use capital letters in your display name as you wish.
info.bioDescription: Bio information must be no more than 300 characters.

createForm.heading: Social Links
createForm.urlDescription: Where does this link lead? Enter a full URL, e.g., https://github.com/lampovayatyan999

socialLinks.errorReorderMessage: Error changing social media link order

header.heading: Account
header.description: Manage your account settings, including access changes, security, and deactivation options.
header.securityDescription: Set up two-factor authentication for enhanced data protection.
header.deactivationDescription: Use this option if you want to temporarily or permanently disable your account. Please be aware of the consequences.

password.heading: Account Password
password.oldPasswordDescription: Enter your old password to verify your identity before changing your password.
password.newPasswordDescription: Your new password must be at least 8 characters long.

twoFactor.heading: TOTP Authentication
twoFactor.description: Increase your account security by enabling TOTP authentication.

enable.heading: Enable TOTP
enable.qrInstructions: Scan the QR code to add TOTP
enable.pinDescription: Please enter the 6-digit code provided by your authentication app.

disable.heading: Are you sure you want to disable TOTP?
disable.message: Disabling TOTP authentication will make your account less secure.

deactivation.heading: Account Deactivation
deactivation.description: After deactivating your account, the account will be completely deleted after 7 days.

confirmModal.heading: Confirm Deactivation
confirmModal.message: Are you sure you want to deactivate your account? Access can only be restored within 7 days.

header.heading: Appearance
header.description: Customize the look and feel of the site interface to your liking. Choose a theme and language to make your experience more comfortable.

theme.heading: Change Theme
theme.description: You can choose a dark or light theme for the site interface

language.heading: Website Language
language.description: Select the language to be used on the website

color.heading: Accent color
color.description: Select an accent color for the interface

header.heading: Notifications
header.description: Configure how you want to receive notifications from MiroStream. You will receive notifications about the start of broadcasts on channels you subscribe to, as well as about new followers.

siteNotifications.heading: Site Notifications
siteNotifications.description: If you turn off site notifications, you will not receive notifications about new followers to your channel or notifications about new broadcasts.

telegramNotifications.heading: Telegram Notifications
telegramNotifications.description: If you enable Telegram notifications, your MiroStream account will be linked to your Telegram account, and you will receive messages about new subscriptions, new streams, password resets, and two-factor authentication codes.

header.heading: Sessions
header.description: Sessions are devices currently or previously used to access your MiroStream account. Active sessions are shown here.

confirmModal.heading: Delete Session
confirmModal.message: Are you sure you want to delete this session? This will log you out of this device and end all active processes associated with it.

header.heading: Stream Keys
header.description: Generate the URL and key to host your broadcast.

instructionModal.heading: 🛠 OBS Setup Instructions for Live Streams
instructionModal.description: To start sharing your content with your audience, follow the detailed instructions for connecting OBS Studio. It's just a few steps, and you're ready to go live!
instructionModal.step1Title: 🔑 Step 1: Download OBS Studio and Generate Server URL and Stream Key
instructionModal.step1Description: To start broadcasting, you need to obtain two important elements: Server URL and Stream Key. Follow these steps:
instructionModal.downloadObsDescription: Before setting up the broadcast, download and install the program.
instructionModal.copyKeys: Copy Server URL and Stream Key
instructionModal.copyKeysDescription: After generation, two fields will appear on the screen: Server URL and Stream Key. Click the copy icons next to each field to save the data to your clipboard.
instructionModal.step2Description: Now that you have the necessary data, let's configure OBS for your broadcast:
instructionModal.openObsDescription: If you don't have OBS installed yet, download it from the official site and install it. After launching, the main OBS page will open.
instructionModal.openStreamSettingsDescription: In the top menu, click 'File' -> 'Settings'. Go to the 'Stream' tab.
instructionModal.enterDetailsDescription: In the 'Service' field, select the 'Custom...' option. Paste the previously copied Server URL into the 'URL' field. Paste your Stream Key into the 'Stream Key' field.
instructionModal.saveSettingsDescription: Click 'Apply' and then 'OK' to save the changes.
instructionModal.step3Description: After successfully configuring OBS, you are ready to start your live broadcast:
instructionModal.startStreamDescription: Return to the main OBS screen and click the 'Start Streaming' button.
instructionModal.monitorStreamDescription: Your broadcast will start in real-time, and you will be able to monitor it both on the platform and in OBS.
instructionModal.congrats: ✨ Congratulations! You have successfully set up OBS for broadcasting on our platform. Your audience is waiting for new bright moments and content! 🎉

createModal.heading: Generate keys
createModal.ingressTypeDescription: Select RTMP for classic broadcasting or WHIP for WebRTC connections.

header.heading: Chat Settings
header.description: Here you can manage your chat settings.

isChatEnabled.heading: Enable Chat
isChatEnabled.description: If you enable chat, viewers will be able to write messages during your stream.

isChatFollowersOnly.heading: Followers-only Chat
isChatFollowersOnly.description: If you enable this setting, only your followers will be able to write messages in the chat.

isChatPremiumFollowersOnly.heading: Premium Followers-only Chat
isChatPremiumFollowersOnly.description: If you enable this setting, only premium followers will be able to write messages in the chat.

header.heading: Followers
header.description: Here is a list of all your followers.

header.heading: Sponsors
header.description: Here is a list of all your sponsors.

header.heading: Premium Plans
header.description: Here is the list of premium plans for your channel.

alert.heading: Channel Verification Required
alert.description: To create premium plans, your channel must be verified. You only need 10 subscribers to get a checkmark and unlock access to this feature.

createForm.heading: Create Plan
createForm.titleDescription: Enter the name of your plan. This name will be displayed to your subscribers.
createForm.descriptionDescription: Describe what your plan includes. This will help your subscribers understand the benefits of the subscription.
createForm.priceDescription: Specify the price of your plan in currency. This is the amount users will pay for the subscription.

header.heading: Transactions
header.description: Transactions related to channel memberships are displayed here.

emptyState.heading: No results found
emptyState.text: We've searched every corner of our website, but unfortunately, we couldn't find anything matching your request. Why not try something else?
